title: Unveiling the AI Tech Scandal: U.S. vs. China
description: Three individuals have been charged by the U.S. Justice Department for conspiring to illegally divert artificial intelligence technology to China. According to the FBI, Yih-Shyan Liaw, Ruei-Tsang Chang, and Ting-Wei Sun allegedly attempted to sell billions in servers with sensitive graphic processing units to Chinese buyers, violating export laws.
content:
The U.S. Justice Department announced on Thursday that it has charged three individuals with a conspiracy involving the unlawful diversion of U.S. artificial intelligence technology to China.
